title: ziziphora maritima
intro: Ziziphora maritima, also known as sea fennel, is a perennial herb native to the Mediterranean region, characterized by its tall, slender stem and feathery leaves. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its expectorant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Ziziphora maritima include relief from respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to reduce inflammation and improve digestion. In herbal preparations, the leaves and flowers of the plant are commonly used to make teas, infusions, and essential oils, which can be used to alleviate various health conditions.
